final:
module counter_4bit(
  input clk,
  input rst_n,
  output reg [3:0] count
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (~rst_n)
      count <= 4'b0000; // Initialize to 0
    else begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
